name: Wavestrider Captain
description: Increases CRIT DMG by 16%. When the wearer becomes the target of another ally target's ability, gains 1 stack of "Help," stacking up to 2 times. If there are 2 stacks of "Help" when the wearer uses their Ultimate, consumes all "Help" to increase the wearer's ATK by 48% for 1 turn.
